ABOUT.HERO_DESC: We believe human connection should be simple, free, and private. No accounts, no tracking — just real conversations.
ABOUT.MISSION_DESC: To provide a frictionless, anonymous platform where anyone in the world can connect with someone new in seconds, without ever creating an account or sharing personal data.
ABOUT.STORY_P1: SayHello was born from a simple question: why does connecting with someone new online require so much friction? Sign-ups, email verification, profiles — all barriers to a simple conversation.
ABOUT.STORY_P2: We built SayHello to remove those barriers entirely. Just enter your name, choose how you want to chat, and you're instantly connected with someone new from anywhere in the world.
ABOUT.STORY_P3: Privacy isn't a feature for us — it's the foundation. We don't store messages, don't track users, and don't sell data. When your chat session ends, it's gone forever.
ABOUT.VALUES_DESC: These principles guide every decision we make at SayHello
ABOUT.VAL1_DESC: No accounts, no logs, no tracking. Your identity stays yours.
ABOUT.VAL2_DESC: From landing to chatting in under 10 seconds. No friction.
ABOUT.VAL3_DESC: Connect with people from 50+ countries around the world.
ABOUT.VAL4_DESC: All communications are encrypted end-to-end between users.
ABOUT.VAL5_DESC: We believe meaningful conversations change lives.
ABOUT.VAL6_DESC: Core features will always be free for everyone, always.
ABOUT.CREATOR_BIO: A passionate full-stack developer from Egypt who built SayHello from scratch. I love creating tools that make people's lives simpler and more connected. SayHello is my vision for what anonymous chat should feel like.
ABOUT.CTA_DESC: Join thousands of users and start a new conversation today.

PRIVACY.HERO_DESC: We are committed to protecting your personal information and your right to privacy. This policy explains what we collect, why, and how we protect it.
PRIVACY.SUM1_DESC: No account or email required. You stay anonymous.
PRIVACY.SUM2_DESC: Chat messages are never stored on our servers.
PRIVACY.SUM4_DESC: We never sell or share your data with third parties.
PRIVACY.S1_P1: SayHello is designed to be minimally invasive. We collect only the information strictly necessary to provide the service.
PRIVACY.S1_P2: We collect: the display name you enter (not verified or stored permanently), temporary session tokens to maintain your chat connection, and basic technical data like IP address and browser type for security purposes.
PRIVACY.S2_P1: The minimal data we collect is used exclusively to operate the service:
PRIVACY.S2_I1: Your name is used only to display in the current chat session
PRIVACY.S2_I2: Session tokens are used to maintain your connection and are deleted when the session ends
PRIVACY.S2_I3: Technical data is used to prevent abuse and maintain platform security
PRIVACY.S2_I4: We never use your data for advertising or marketing purposes
PRIVACY.S3_P1: SayHello does not store your chat messages. All messages are transmitted in real-time between users and are immediately discarded once delivered. No conversation history is kept on our servers.
PRIVACY.S3_HIGHLIGHT: When your chat session ends, all associated data — including your name and session token — is permanently deleted from our systems.
PRIVACY.S4_P1: Even with minimal data collection, you retain full rights over your information:
PRIVACY.S4_I1: Right to know what data we hold about you
PRIVACY.S4_I2: Right to request deletion of any data
PRIVACY.S4_I3: Right to opt out of any data collection beyond what is strictly necessary
PRIVACY.S5_P1: SayHello uses only essential cookies required for the service to function. We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or advertising cookies.
PRIVACY.S5_WARNING: We do not use Google Analytics, Facebook Pixel, or any third-party tracking scripts that monitor your behavior across websites.
PRIVACY.S6_P1: We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with any third-party companies for their commercial purposes.
PRIVACY.S6_P2: Our infrastructure providers may process technical data as part of operating the service, but are contractually bound to treat this data with strict confidentiality.
PRIVACY.S7_P1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify users of significant changes by updating the date at the top of this page. Continued use of SayHello after updates constitutes acceptance of the revised policy.
PRIVACY.CONTACT_DESC: If you have questions or concerns about this privacy policy or your data, you can contact us at: privacy@sayhello.app

TIPS.HERO_DESC: Simple, practical tips to help you have better conversations, stay safe, and make the most of SayHello.
TIPS.T1_DESC: A simple greeting like 'Hi! How are you?' goes a long way. Starting positively sets the tone for a fun conversation.
TIPS.T2_DESC: Instead of yes/no questions, ask things like 'What do you enjoy doing in your free time?' to keep the conversation flowing naturally.
TIPS.T3_DESC: Emojis help convey tone and emotion in text. A well-placed 😊 or 🎉 can make your messages feel more warm and friendly.
TIPS.T4_DESC: SayHello connects people from 50+ countries. If language is a barrier, try simple short sentences or use the emoji reactions to communicate.
TIPS.T5_DESC: Never share your real name, phone number, address, or social media handles with strangers. Your privacy is your protection.
TIPS.T6_DESC: If a conversation feels uncomfortable or inappropriate, use the Next button immediately. You are never obligated to continue any chat.
TIPS.T7_DESC: The Next button exists for a reason. If someone is being disrespectful, skip them instantly. No explanation needed.
TIPS.T8_DESC: For the best voice message experience, record in a quiet environment. Background noise can make it hard for your partner to understand you.
TIPS.T9_DESC: Headphones reduce echo and improve voice quality for both you and your chat partner. Even basic earphones make a big difference.
TIPS.T10_DESC: A stable Wi-Fi or 4G connection ensures smooth chatting without interruptions. Avoid switching networks mid-conversation.
TIPS.T11_DESC: Always use the latest version of SayHello for the best performance, newest features, and most up-to-date security patches.
TIPS.T12_DESC: For the smoothest experience, especially for voice messages and video calls, use Chrome on Android or Safari on iOS.
TIPS.GUIDE_TITLE: How to Have a Great Chat
TIPS.GUIDE_DESC: Follow these four simple steps for the best SayHello experience
TIPS.GUIDE1_DESC: Use a fun nickname — no real name needed. Stay anonymous and comfortable.
TIPS.GUIDE2_DESC: Our system instantly connects you with a random stranger from anywhere in the world.
TIPS.GUIDE3_DESC: Break the ice with a friendly greeting. Ask questions, share thoughts, have fun!
TIPS.GUIDE4_DESC: Loving the chat? Keep going! Not feeling it? Hit Next to meet someone new.
TIPS.DO1: Be polite and respectful to every stranger
TIPS.DO2: Use the Next button if you feel uncomfortable
TIPS.DO4: Try voice messages for a more personal touch
TIPS.DO5: Explore video calls for face-to-face connection
TIPS.DONT1: Share personal information like your phone or address
TIPS.DONT2: Continue a chat that makes you uncomfortable
TIPS.DONT4: Send spam messages or repeat the same content
TIPS.DONT5: Try to move the conversation to other platforms
TIPS.CTA_TITLE: Ready to Put These Tips to Use?
TIPS.CTA_DESC: Start a chat now and apply what you've learned!

FAQ.HERO_DESC: Everything you need to know about SayHello. Can't find your answer? Send us a message below.
FAQ.NO_RESULTS_DESC: Try a different search term or browse all categories.
FAQ.A1: SayHello is a free anonymous chat platform that connects you with random strangers from around the world. No registration, no email — just enter your name and start chatting instantly.
FAQ.Q2: Do I need to create an account?
FAQ.A2: No! SayHello requires zero registration. You simply enter a display name (no real name needed) and you're instantly connected. No email, no password, no profile.
FAQ.A3: SayHello connects you with random users from over 50 countries worldwide. Every conversation is with a different, randomly matched stranger.
FAQ.A4: Yes, SayHello is completely free to use. Text chat, voice messages, and video calls are all available at no cost, forever.
FAQ.A5: Yes. You only enter a display name — it doesn't need to be your real name. We never ask for email, phone number, or any personal information.
FAQ.A6: No. SayHello does not store any chat messages. All conversations are transmitted in real-time and permanently deleted once the session ends. There is no message history.
FAQ.A7: Yes. All connections on SayHello use encrypted protocols to protect your communication. We never sell or share your data with third parties.
FAQ.Q8: How does the Next button work?
FAQ.A8: Pressing Next immediately ends your current chat and places you back in the matching queue to connect with a new stranger. Use it anytime — no explanation needed.
FAQ.A9: Tap the microphone button to start recording. You can pause, resume, or cancel before sending. Once sent, both you and your partner can play back the message at any time.
FAQ.Q10: How does the video call work?
FAQ.A10: Select Video Call from the home page. You'll need to grant camera and microphone permissions. You're then matched with a random stranger for a live face-to-face video chat.
FAQ.A11: Yes! You can react to any text or voice message with a ❤️ emoji by tapping on the message. The reaction is visible to both you and your chat partner.
FAQ.A12: Make sure you have a stable internet connection. If issues persist, try refreshing the page or switching between Wi-Fi and mobile data. Using Chrome or Safari gives the best results.
FAQ.A13: Yes! SayHello works on all modern smartphones and tablets through your browser. You can also download the Android APK from our Download page for a native app experience.
FAQ.A14: Google Chrome on Android and Safari on iOS provide the best experience. For voice messages and video calls specifically, these browsers have the best support for required audio/video APIs.
FAQ.CONTACT_DESC: Didn't find what you were looking for? We'll get back to you as soon as possible.
FAQ.COOLDOWN_MSG: You can send another message in
FAQ.FORM_SUCCESS: Message sent successfully! We'll get back to you soon.
FAQ.FORM_MSG_PH: Describe your question or issue in detail...
FAQ.FORM_NOTE: We typically respond within 24 hours. Your email is only used to reply to your message.
FAQ.CTA_DESC: Join thousands of users and have a great conversation right now.
